mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAY_HIST ( USER_ID, PAY_DIV_CD, TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY, ORD_SN, PTNR_ORD_ID, ITEM_NM, ITEM_QTY, PAY_STAT_CD, TOT_AMT, TAX_FREE_AMT, VAT_AMT, PAY_READY_DT, PAY_APRVL_DT, RGTR_ID, POINT_AMT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{payDivCd}, #{tossPaymentKey}, #{ordSn}, #{ptnrOrdId}, #{itemNm}, #{itemQty}, #{payStatCd}, #{totAmt}, #{taxFreeAmt}, #{vatAmt}, #{payReadyDt}, #{payAprvlDt}, #{rgtrId}, #{pointAmt} )
